subject: biology
title: 19M.1.HL.TZ1.7
question_html:
What is common to RNA and DNA?

A. Thymine

B. Nitrogenous bases

C. Histones

D. Deoxyribose
examiners_html: Question 7 was the third easiest in the exam, and several teachers commented that it was too easy, but on the other hand we can be pleased that more than 80% of candidates knew that both RNA and DNA contain nitrogenous bases.
